<?php /** * Mockery (https://docs.mockery.io/) * * @copyright https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/COPYRIGHT.md * @license https://github.com/mockery/mockery/blob/HEAD/LICENSE BSD 3-Clause License * @link https://github.com/mockery/mockery for the canonical source repository */ namespace Mockery; class VerificationExpectation extends Expectation { public function __clone() { parent::__clone(); $this->_actualCount = 0; } /** * @return void */ public function clearCountValidators() { $this->_countValidators = []; } }
